const feeds = [
  { source: "Hacker News", url: "https://hnrss.org/newest?q=AI%20OR%20LLM%20OR%20developer%20tools%20OR%20agent" },
  { source: "OpenAI", url: "https://openai.com/news/rss.xml" },
  { source: "Hugging Face", url: "https://huggingface.co/blog/feed.xml" },
  { source: "GitHub Blog", url: "https://github.blog/feed/" },
  { source: "n8n Blog", url: "https://blog.n8n.io/rss/" },
  { source: "Reddit LocalLLaMA", url: "https://www.reddit.com/r/LocalLLaMA/.rss" },
  { source: "Reddit OpenAI", url: "https://www.reddit.com/r/OpenAI/.rss" },
  { source: "Reddit Programming", url: "https://www.reddit.com/r/programming/.rss" },
];
return feeds.map((feed) => ({ json: feed }));
